scenario: You manage application lifecycle management (ALM) for a company that uses Microsoft Dataverse solutions with Azure DevOps. You need to choose the correct action for each solution task.
q: Match each solution task to the action you should perform. Each action may be used once, more than once, or not at all.
rows: Deploy changes to a test environment.
why: You should create an UNMANAGED solution to create a new solution component - new components can only be created in an unmanaged solution. You should create a MANAGED solution to deploy changes to a test environment - managed solutions are deployed to all non-development environments. You should create an UNMANAGED solution to edit a solution component - you cannot edit a component in a managed solution, only within an unmanaged solution. You should not clone a patch or clone the solution: cloned patches and cloned solutions are not supported with Azure DevOps.
